creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text: I did some investigating on this.  The problem still exists and seems to surface when print/cups-base and print/cups-client have different options selected for Zeroconf support.  For example if cups-base uses AVAHI and cups-client uses MDNSRESPONDER compilation will fail.  I'm unsure how this can be fixed.  The split of cups into cups-base, cups-client, cups-image makes this harder than it has to be.
